title: Darshan Hiranandani : How do I include a bulleted list in a checklist item?
excerpt: I have a task with a checklist, and I want to include bulleted lists within the checklist items. However, when I apply the bullet style, it changes the entire checklist to bullets. Is it possible to have a bulleted list …

posts.author: darshanhiranandani (Darshan Hiranandani)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a task with a checklist, and I want to include bulleted lists within the checklist items. However, when I apply the bullet style, it changes the entire checklist to bullets. Is it possible to have a bulleted list within individual checklist items without affecting the rest of the checklist? If so, how can I achieve this?

Regards
Darshan Hiranandani
